EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A client from host {src.host} accessed a web resource on host {dst.host}. HTTP return code: {datafield1} ({datafield2})
A client from host {src.host} failed to access a web resource on host {dst.host}. HTTP return code: {datafield1}
A client from host {src.host} failed to access a web resource on host {dst.host}. HTTP return code: {datafield1} ({datafield2})
